# M8 Rewrite Fixture

This fixture records artifacts regenerated by the Tauri rewrite from the
coherent `tests/fixtures/m0-legacy/proto` sources. The generated examples live
under `examples/TAURI_REWRITE`; `manifest.json` fixes their text hashes, Excel
workbook structure, tool hashes, and Unreal cycle diagnostics.

The legacy baseline and stale repository examples remain separate and are not
overwritten. Regenerate with `pnpm fixtures:rewrite` and verify with
`pnpm fixtures:rewrite:check`.

All eight protoc language outputs are generated. Rust uses the experimental
upb codegen bundled into `libprotoc 34.1`; Go uses the committed
`protoc-gen-go` executable.
